params.context: PHASE 4 FRONTEND-INSPECT — capture wrtn Socket.IO s2c chat frame schema. NON-PII prompt to avoid APF block. User logged in @ 09:56 KST. Capture ALL WebSocket frames at wss://api.wrtn.ai/wrtn.socket.io/ during AI reply streaming. Open DevTools Network → WebSocket Messages, record server-to-client frames containing chat message content. Save frame body samples (engine.io packet type + socket.io packet type + JSON event name + payload schema). Especially: assistant response frames containing AI reply text. Save all captured frames to results/{id}_screenshots/ or files/{id}/.
